testcase.failure: Line 2: MASTERCARD detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 5425233430109903 Validator: creditcard Line 1: VISA detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 4532015112830366 Validator: creditcard Line 3: MRN detected with 65.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: 1234567 Validator: medicalid
